3284580.name: The Nightmare of Pandemic - Kyle's Story
3284580.description:
Kyle wakes up with a headache, not realizing he has survived a helicopter crash. He finds himself alone on a farm, surrounded by wreckage. His team is dead, and he must recover the pilot's remains to complete their mission.

As Kyle assesses his injuries, a bright flash of light envelops him. Suddenly, he is floating in space, wearing a space suit. Just then, a friend appears and tells him, “I got a message from Lucas. You need to help Kevin with teleportation.”

Kyle realizes he must assist Kevin, who possesses vital information. He hears Lucas's orders echo in his mind: “Help Kevin with teleportation.” Though he can’t remember much about what happened during the mission, he knows this is just the beginning.

After navigating a couple of corridors, Kyle starts to feel unwell. The walls seem to close in on him, and he finds himself locked in. Panic rises as he realizes he must reach Kevin and see if he is okay. Determined, Kyle pushes through the discomfort, knowing he has to find Kevin before it’s too late.

Special Thanks to OranJex

General Voice Actor, Video Editor & Assets Contributor.

Features:

First-Person Shooting Combat

Scary, Eerie Environments

Jump Scares

Horror Aspects

Asymmetrical Environments

Music and Story

Weapons:

Handgun

Shotgun

Sniper Rifle

Automatic Rifles

Melee Weapons

Explore the game carefully you might just stumble upon some hidden Easter eggs! Keep looking around, and you might find some interesting surprises.

The Game Includes:

Survival Horror: Navigate through terrifying environments as you fight for survival against hordes of relentless zombies. Resource management is key; every bullet counts, and you must scavenge wisely.

Violence & Gore: Experience brutal combat mechanics that showcase visceral zombie takedowns and gruesome encounters. The chilling atmosphere is complemented by graphic depictions of horror that keep you on edge.

Supernatural Themes: Unravel a haunting narrative filled with dark secrets and the supernatural origins of the zombie outbreak. Your journey reveals twisted experiments and malevolent forces that challenge your perception of reality.

Strong Language & Dark Themes: Immerse yourself in a gritty storyline that explores despair, betrayal, and the horrors of survival. The intense dialogue and narrative themes reflect the grim situation Kyle faces.

Dynamic Gameplay: Engage in intense combat and solve intricate puzzles as you uncover the mysteries of the outbreak and its connection to your mission. Choose your approach—fight or evade—depending on your resources and the situation at hand.

Immersive Atmosphere: With haunting visuals, chilling sound design, and a tense soundtrack, Fractured Reality envelops you in a world overrun by the undead. The tension builds as you explore desolate locations, all while being hunted by the very creatures you’re trying to escape.
